sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112518" key="fukotu/xh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φυκοτύχη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n112518.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plaster,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.35</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.17</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φικοτύχη.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
